title: ononis reclinata subsp. mollis
intro: Ononis reclinata subsp. mollis, also known as the Downy Restharrow, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. It has been used to treat various health issues, such as urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and gout, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve urine production. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to promote digestion and relieve menstrual cramps.
